---
name: Propose a skill
about: Suggest a new engineering playbook (skill) for the library
title: "skill: <short name>"
labels: [skill-proposal]
---

## What skill are you proposing?

Proposed skill name (kebab-case, e.g. `caching-strategy`):

One-line description (**what** it does and **when** to use it, third person):

## Why does it belong here?

<!-- What recurring engineering task does it help with? Who is it for?
Why is it durable (true across stacks and years), not a tool tutorial? -->

## What would it cover?

<!-- Rough outline: the core principle, a checklist/template, and the main
anti-patterns. -->

## Overlap check

- [ ] I checked the [README catalog](../../README.md) and this doesn't duplicate an existing skill
      (if it's close to one, note which and how it differs):

## Willing to write it?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to open a PR
- [ ] No, proposing for someone else to pick up
